current_work.title: Blender Live Plate連結
current_work.summary: ローカルBlenderで生成した3D factory plateを、Factory中央のワークフローアニメーションへリアルタイム投影する導線を接続しています。
current_work.status_text: 有料生成・投稿公開は止めたまま、UI表示のみ更新中

workflow.label: 素材
workflow.note: 17 generated cast, UI captures, and Codex operation sources are registered.

workflow.label: 台本
workflow.note: 60s story split into 10 beats and 4 Seedance clips.

workflow.label: 生成前確認
workflow.note: Visual-only Seedance, ElevenLabs narration, post subtitles confirmed as policy.

workflow.label: 3Dプレビュー
workflow.note: Local Blender live plate is rendered and projected into the workflow animation.

workflow.label: 費用見積
workflow.note: Run cost estimate before any paid generation.

workflow.label: 音声
workflow.note: Use exact Japanese narration. Do not rely on Seedance audio.

workflow.label: 字幕編集
workflow.note: Add after audio timing is locked.

workflow.label: レビュー
workflow.note: Judge face stability, continuity, rights, claims, and final edit.

jobs.title: Clip 1 / 0-15s
jobs.note: Hook: rainy crosswalk, same map, Ren points to hidden alley.

jobs.title: Clip 2 / 15-30s
jobs.note: Discovery: office lobby to hidden cafe.

jobs.title: Clip 3 / 30-45s
jobs.note: Threshold: students, old shop, stamp completes the map.

jobs.title: Clip 4 / 45-60s
jobs.note: Payoff: rooftop cast reveal and loop hook.
